title: agrostis fonckii
intro: Agrostis fonckii is a type of grass native to the high-altitude meadows of the Himalayas. This plant is traditionally used in Ayurvedic medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Agrostis fonckii include its ability to reduce stress and anxiety, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. In herbal preparations, Agrostis fonckii is often used in teas, decoctions, and infusions, as well as in the form of dried roots and leaves.
